question: What is the refund policy?
ground_truth: Customers can request a full refund within 30 days of purchase. After 30 days, a partial refund may be issued at the company's discretion.
ground_truth_context: Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of the original purchase date.
After the 30-day window, partial refunds may be granted on a case-by-case basis at the sole discretion of the company.

question: How do I contact customer support?
ground_truth: Customer support can be reached via email at support@example.com or by calling 1-800-555-0199 during business hours (9 AM to 5 PM EST, Monday through Friday).
ground_truth_context: For assistance, contact our customer support team at support@example.com.
Phone support is available at 1-800-555-0199 from 9 AM to 5 PM EST, Monday through Friday.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
ground_truth: Accepted payment methods include Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers.
ground_truth_context: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, and American Express.
Alternative payment options include PayPal and direct bank transfers.

question: What is the shipping time for domestic orders?
ground_truth: Domestic orders are typically delivered within 5 to 7 business days. Expedited shipping options are available for an additional fee.
ground_truth_context: Standard domestic shipping takes 5 to 7 business days.
Expedited and overnight shipping options are available at checkout for an additional fee.

question: Is there a warranty on products?
ground_truth: All products come with a one-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. Extended warranty plans are available for purchase.
ground_truth_context: Every product is backed by a one-year limited warranty that covers defects in materials and workmanship.
Extended warranty plans covering up to three years can be purchased separately.
